channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Coreano Hermano': Mexico and South Korea fans share mutual affection before match
item.description: Before a World Cup match, opposing fans celebrated together, calling each other 'brother' and even hoping for a draw...

item.title: 'Rejected': How federal prisons block grievances and delay care for years
item.description: Prisoners retain the right to file grievances about treatment, including abuse and denied medical care. However, in most cases...

item.title: Trump told ships to 'start your engines' after Iran deal, but action remains pending
item.description: Iran's control of the Strait of Hormuz caused global disruption during the conflict with the U.S. and Israel. A tentative deal has been reached, but...

item.title: Top World Cup goal scorers, led by Lionel Messi, make an immediate impact
item.description: The World Cup is less than a week old, but goal scoring has been outstanding. Argentina's Lionel Messi scored three goals...
